headline: A Look At Valero Energy (VLO) Valuation As Geopolitical Tensions And Analyst Support Shape Sector Expectations
summary: Recent commentary on Valero Energy (VLO) has been sparked by analyst discussions that connect the refiner to hostilities in Iran and developments in the Permian Basin, as sector views adjust to these geopolitical pressures. See our latest analysis for Valero Energy. Despite a recent pullback, with a 1-day share price return decline of 7.48% and a 30-day share price return decline of 6.76% to US$223.65, Valero’s 90-day share price return of 21.91% and 1-year total shareholder return of 109.18%...
